title: linaria heterophylla subsp. stricta
intro: Linaria heterophylla subsp. stricta, also known as strict toadflax, is a plant species in the toadflax genus, characterized by its annual or biennial growth habit and vibrant purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Linaria heterophylla subsp. stricta include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as supporting respiratory health and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat respiratory issues and other health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
